site.name: Uttar Pradesh School Standards Authority Portal
site.description: Transparent school grading and accreditation system

home.title: Uttar Pradesh School Standards Authority Portal
home.subtitle: Transparent school grading and accreditation system
home.publicDesc: View school assessments, grades and public disclosure

public.title: Public Information
public.subtitle: Access school data, assessments, and public disclosure
public.directoryDesc: Browse and search all schools in Uttar Pradesh
public.findSchoolsDesc: Find the right school based on your criteria
public.feedbackDesc: Submit a grievance or share feedback

syntheticData.title: Sample data — not official records
syntheticData.bodyList: Some or all of the school names and details shown below are sample data prepared for the pilot. Treat them as illustrative only, not as official records.
syntheticData.bodyProfile: The name and details shown for this school are sample data prepared for the pilot. They are not official records and will be replaced once verified information is available.

school.title: School Login
school.body: Enter your UDISE code and password to access the school portal.

sssa.title: System Login
sssa.body: For SSSA Admin and District Officials.

verifier.title: Verifier Login
verifier.body: Enter your credentials to access the verifier portal.

districtLogin.title: District Login
districtLogin.body: Enter your credentials to access the district portal.

directory.title: School Directory
directory.name: School Name
directory.noResults: No schools found matching your criteria.

schoolProfile.title: School Profile
schoolProfile.resultsPlaceholder: Assessment results will appear here after the first grading cycle.

findSchools.title: Find Schools
findSchools.subtitle: Answer a few questions to find the right school for your child
findSchools.step1Desc: Fill in the required information to find matching schools.
findSchools.step2Desc: Optionally narrow your results with these preferences.
findSchools.step2Note: These criteria are for future use. Filtering by these fields is not yet available in demo data.
findSchools.specialNeedsNote: Special needs filtering is not available in demo data.
findSchools.ageOutOfRange: Age is outside the Class 1–12 range (6–17 years)

findResults.title: Search Results
findResults.gradeNote: Grade-based filtering is not available in demo data. All schools in the selected area are shown.
findResults.specialNeedsNote: Special needs filtering is not available in demo data.
findResults.noResults: No schools found matching your criteria.

feedbackPage.title: Dispute & Feedback
feedbackPage.subtitle: Report an issue or track your submissions
feedbackPage.disputeCardDesc: Report incorrect information or raise a formal complaint
feedbackPage.trackCardDesc: Check the status of a previously submitted dispute

dispute.newSubtitle: Follow the steps below to submit a formal dispute about a school
dispute.step1Desc: Search for the school you want to raise a dispute about.
dispute.step2Desc: Choose the category that best describes your dispute.
dispute.step4Desc: Enter your mobile number and verify with OTP to submit.
dispute.schoolSearchPh: Search by school name or UDISE code…
dispute.mobileRequired: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number
dispute.otpSentMsg: Mock OTP sent! Use 123456 to verify.
dispute.invalidOtp: Invalid OTP. Please use 123456 for the demo.
dispute.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
dispute.successDesc: Your dispute has been registered and will be sent to the school for response.
dispute.saveTicketId: Save this ticket ID to track your dispute status later.

track.title: Track Dispute
track.subtitle: Enter your ticket ID and registered mobile number to check the status
track.invalidInput: Please enter a valid ticket ID and 10-digit mobile number.
track.notFound: No dispute found with this ticket ID and mobile number.

ticketActions.reasonRequired: A reason is required for rejection.
ticketActions.actionError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ticketActions.ticketClosed: This ticket has been closed. No further actions are available.
ticketActions.escalated: {count, plural, =0 {No tickets to escalate} one {# ticket escalated} other {# tickets escalated}}

adminTickets.title: Dispute Tickets
adminTickets.noTickets: No tickets match the current filters.

appSchool.saDraft: {count, plural, =0 {Draft — no responses yet} one {Draft — # response saved} other {Draft — # responses saved}}

appSchool.appealsDesc: Appeal against verification differences within the appeal window

appVerifier.title: Verifier Home
appVerifier.placeholder: Verifier workspace will be available in the next step.

verifierDashboard.assignedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No schools assigned} one {# school assigned} other {# schools assigned}}
verifierDashboard.noAssignments: No schools have been assigned to you for this cycle.

verifierAssessment.title: Verification Assessment
verifierAssessment.noFramework: No published framework available for verification.
verifierAssessment.submittedBanner: Your verification assessment has been submitted and locked.
verifierAssessment.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
verifierAssessment.submitConfirm: Submit your verification? This will lock all responses and cannot be undone.
verifierAssessment.submitMissing: Cannot submit — some parameters are unanswered:
verifierAssessment.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

verifierAssign.title: Verifier Assignments
verifierAssign.noCycle: No active cycle found. Create a cycle first.
verifierAssign.selectDistrictsHint: Leave empty to assign for all districts.
verifierAssign.ignoreDistrictMappingHint: When checked, any active verifier can be assigned to schools in any district regardless of their district mapping.

verifierFeedback.title: Verifier Feedback
verifierFeedback.subtitle: Compare your self-assessment with the verifier's assessment
verifierFeedback.noVerifierYet: No verifier assessment has been submitted for your school yet. Please check back later.
verifierFeedback.appealEligible: You are eligible to file an appeal against verification differences.
verifierFeedback.appealInProgress: Your appeal has been submitted and is under review.

appDistrict.title: District Home
appDistrict.usersDesc: Create and manage verifier accounts in your district

appDistrict.placeholder: District dashboard will be available in the next step.

appSssa.title: SSSA Admin Home
appSssa.ticketsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No tickets} one {# ticket} other {# tickets}}
appSssa.frameworkDesc: Build and manage the school quality assessment framework
appSssa.monitoringDesc: Track school self-assessment progress across the state
appSssa.verificationDesc: Assign verifiers to schools and manage verification workflow
appSssa.finalizationDesc: Appeals, final scores, grade assignment, and result publication
appSssa.usersDesc: Create, manage, and configure users and verifier assignments
appSssa.placeholder: Admin console will be available in the next step.

evidence.invalidType: Only PDF, JPG, and PNG files are allowed.
evidence.hint: PDF, JPG, PNG — max 10 MB, up to 3 files

selfAssessment.title: Self Assessment
selfAssessment.noActiveFramework: No active cycle with a published framework found. Self assessment is not available at this time.
selfAssessment.submittedBanner: Your self assessment has been submitted successfully. It is now locked for review.
selfAssessment.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
selfAssessment.submitConfirm: Submit your self assessment? This will lock all responses and cannot be undone.
selfAssessment.submitMissing: Cannot submit — some parameters are unanswered:
selfAssessment.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

monitoring.title: Self Assessment Monitoring
monitoring.noResponses: No self assessment responses recorded yet.
monitoring.cycleBanner: Active cycle has {total} schools, {started} started, {submitted} submitted.

framework.title: SQAAF Framework Builder
framework.noCycle: No active cycle found. Please create a cycle first.
framework.noCycles: No cycles created yet. Add a new cycle to get started.
framework.noFramework: No framework exists yet. Import from Excel to create one.
framework.deleteCycleConfirm: Delete this cycle and its draft framework? This cannot be undone.
framework.cloneHint: The latest published framework will be copied as a starting point for this cycle.
framework.clonedNotice: Framework cloned from cycle {source} as a new draft. You can now edit it.
framework.unpublishConfirm: Revert this framework to Draft? This will allow editing again.
framework.publishedReadonly: This framework is published and read-only.
framework.publishConfirm: Are you sure? Publishing locks the framework permanently.
framework.publishErrors: Cannot publish. Fix the following errors:
framework.deleteConfirm: Delete this parameter? This cannot be undone.

appeal.title: Appeal
appeal.subtitle: Appeal against differences between your self-assessment and the verifier's assessment
appeal.notEligible: You are not eligible for an appeal. Either no verifier assessment has been submitted or the appeal window has closed.
appeal.noDiffs: No differences found between your self-assessment and verifier assessment. No appeal needed.
appeal.diffsCount: {count, plural, one {# parameter differs} other {# parameters differ}} between your assessment and the verifier's.
appeal.justificationPh: Explain why you believe your level is correct…
appeal.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
appeal.submitConfirm: Submit your appeal? Once submitted, you cannot edit it.
appeal.submitError: Could not submit. Please try again.
appeal.lockedBanner: Your appeal has been submitted and is under review. No further edits are possible.
appeal.decided: Your appeal has been decided by SSSA.
appeal.saveBeforeEvidence: Save draft first to attach evidence files.

finalization.title: Finalization & Results
finalization.finalizeAllConfirm: Compute final scores for all schools? This may take a moment.
finalization.finalizedAll: {count, plural, one {# school computed} other {# schools computed}}.
finalization.publishConfirm: Publish all results? This makes them publicly visible and immutable.
finalization.decideConfirm: Save your decisions for all items? This will mark the appeal as decided.
finalization.alreadyDecided: This appeal has already been decided.
finalization.cycleBanner: Active cycle: {total} schools, {sa} with SA submitted, {verified} with verification.
finalization.computeHelper: Compute will generate results for schools with submitted assessments. If verifier is missing, self assessment is used as the final score.

userMgmt.title: User Management
userMgmt.bulkDesc: Upload a CSV file to create multiple users at once. Download the template for the correct format.
userMgmt.confirmDisable: Disable this user? They will not be able to log in.
userMgmt.bulkSuccess: {count, plural, one {# user created} other {# users created}} successfully.
userMgmt.bulkErrors: Validation errors found. Fix and re-upload.
userMgmt.previewRows: {count, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}} to import
